rules.pattern: A bit shift operation has a shift amount which is too large or has a negative value.
A virtual method is called from a constructor/destructor.
An expression with no side-effect or unintended effect indicates a possible logic flaw
Assignment of a variable or expression to itself has no effect
Floating-point expressions shall not be directly or indirectly tested for equality or inequality.
Leak of memory or pointers to system resources

When dividing two values of integer types, integer division is used, which ignores any remainder. When such a result is used in a context expecting a floating-point number, it is likely that floating-point division was intended.
